[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1101100000 4
1 1101110110 7
2 1000001110 4
3 1010010111 6
4 1101101010 6
5 1101011100 6
6 0001011111 6
7 1111111111 a

01 10 1101011111 8
12 21 0011111111 8
23 32 1111100111 8

45 54 1101111110 8
56 65 1010011111 7
67 76 1111111111 a match 7
70 07 1101111110 8
